since_last: 32% of 101 AI names green; Powering AI leads +0.63%; AI bubble risk 50 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 32% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -1.40% · BTC -2.00% · Gold -2.40% · Nasdaq100 -2.07%. 32% of 101 AI names are green — broad selling. Powering AI is doing the heavy lifting at +0.63%.

cards.headline: Powering AI leads, AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Powering AI at +0.63%; weakest is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at -3.16%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: TSLA is the standout at -14.04%
cards.body: Leaders: GEV +5.25%, HON +4.80%, CBRS +4.03%, AVAV +3.92%, SKHY +3.74%. Laggards: TSLA -14.04%, CRNC -8.53%, GOOGL -6.75%, SYM -5.28%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.50% at $116.99
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.50% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
